summary: Added an expandable selected-chapter record deck to the Path Map Chapter Archive so each date-derived chapter opens typed trail records with direct Event Proof and Route Replay synchronization.

queries: master detail timeline UX pattern activity feed grouped events
progressive disclosure detail panel timeline event list UX
event log drilldown design pattern activity timeline
pattern_notes: Grouped histories need a master-detail layer so operators can scan the chapter first, then inspect individual records.
Progressive disclosure supports compact first views while keeping deeper history one action away.
Log drilldown patterns are valuable when a timeline grows: users should move from aggregate groups to related raw records without writing queries.

ui_contract: Render a selected-chapter record deck inside the generated-art Chapter Archive.
Show four chapter records by default, using replay glyphs, type labels, dates, titles, and summaries.
Clicking a record focuses Event Proof and synchronizes Route Replay through the existing event-focus contract.
Reveal-more controls expand the selected chapter in browser-local state without mutating snapshot data.
Switching chapters resets to that chapter's own record deck while preserving the Event Stream reveal behavior.

baseline.evidence: Pre-edit code search showed no path-chapter-record UI, state, or data-path-chapter-reveal controls. A browser red route could not be preserved after cache tokens changed because the static shell loaded the latest app files.

green_route.evidence: Rendered one Chapter Archive record deck with header 'Chapter Records 06/15 dossier 4 / 43', four record buttons with glyphs, and a Reveal 4 more chapter records control.

record_focus.evidence: Clicking the second record selected 'Digital products local gated hold register', focused Event Proof on that evidence, moved Event Proof to 2 / 64, and synced Route Replay to Stage 63 of 64.

reveal_and_switch.evidence: Reveal expanded the 06/15 dossier from 4 / 43 to 8 / 43 while keeping the selected record active. Switching to 06/14 reset the deck to 4 / 21, focused Event Proof at 44 / 64, synced Route Replay to Stage 21 of 64, and showed Event Stream at 64 of 64 visible.

responsive.evidence: All tested viewports rendered one record deck with four records, no bad rectangles, and document width equal to client width.
